nasb.text: and let them be for lights in the expanse of the heavens to give light on the earth”; and it was so.

esv.text: and let them be lights in the expanse of the heavens to give light upon the earth.” And it was so.

cnv.text: 它們要在天上穹蒼中發光，照耀地上！”事就這樣成了。

ccb.text: 发光普照大地。”果然如此。

csbs.text: 让它们在天上穹苍中发光来照亮大地。”事情就如此成就了。
